title: dimorphotheca × turicensis
intro: Dimorphotheca × turicensis, also known as the Alpine Sunbird or Yellow Daisy, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dimorphotheca × turicensis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dimorphotheca × turicensis can be made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
